heading: Credits from tax credit bonds allowed to shareholders
label: 853A Credits from tax credit bonds allowed to shareholders

children.text: which holds (directly or indirectly) one or more tax credit bonds on one or more applicable dates during the taxable year, and
which meets the requirements of section 852(a) for the taxable year (determined after the application of this section),

children.label: A
children.text: shall not be allowed such credits,

children.label: B
children.text: shall include in gross income (as interest) for such taxable year the amount which would have been so included with respect to such credits had the application of this section not been elected,

children.label: C
children.text: shall include in earnings and profits the amount so included in gross income, and

children.label: D
children.text: shall be treated as making one or more distributions of money with respect to its stock equal to the amount of such credits on the date or dates (on or after the applicable date for any such credit) during such taxable year (or following the close of the taxable year pursuant to section 855) selected by the company, and

children.label: A
children.text: be treated as receiving such shareholder’s proportionate share of any distribution of money which is treated as made by such investment company under paragraph (1)(D), and

children.label: B
children.text: be allowed credits against the tax imposed by this chapter equal to the amount of such distribution, subject to the provisions of this title applicable to the credit involved.

children.heading: Statements to shareholders2See 2010 Amendment note below.2
children.label: c Statements to shareholders2See 2010 Amendment note below.2
children.text: The amount treated as a distribution of money received by a shareholder under subsection (b)(2)(A) (and as credits allowed to such shareholder under subsection (b)(2)(B)) shall not exceed the amount so reported by the regulated investment company in a written statement furnished to such shareholder.

children.heading: Manner of making election
children.label: d Manner of making election
children.text: The election provided in subsection (a) shall be made in such manner as the Secretary may prescribe.

children.label: i
children.text: a qualified tax credit bond (as defined in section 54A(d)),1

children.label: ii
children.text: a build America bond (as defined in section 54AA(d)) other than a qualified bond described in section 54AA(g), and11

children.label: iii
children.text: any bond for which a credit is allowable under subpart H of part IV of subchapter A of this chapter.1

children.label: i
children.text: in the case of a qualified tax credit bond or a bond described in subparagraph (A)(iii), any credit allowance date (as defined in section 54A(e)(1)), and1

children.label: ii
children.text: in the case of a build America bond (as defined in section 54AA(d)), any interest payment date (as defined in section 54AA(e)).11

children.heading: Stripped tax credit bonds
children.label: 2 Stripped tax credit bonds
children.text: If the ownership of a tax credit bond is separated from the credit with respect to such bond, subsection (a) shall be applied by reference to the instruments evidencing the entitlement to the credit rather than the tax credit bond.

children.heading: Regulations, etc.
children.label: f Regulations, etc.
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations or other guidance as may be necessary or appropriate to carry out the purposes of this section, including methods for determining a shareholder’s proportionate share of credits.
